name: cc-component-library-monorepo
description: Component library platform for CC ecommerce - Geist-inspired design system

scripts.build: pnpm --filter packages/design-tokens run build && pnpm --filter packages/ui-library run build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter packages/design-tokens run lint && pnpm --filter packages/ui-library run lint
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter packages/design-tokens run type-check && pnpm --filter packages/ui-library run type-check
